note.soap:
S: Medication renewal request. Medication: lisinopril. Previously prescribed: yes. Side effects concern: no. New/worsening symptoms: no. Age band: 18-64.
O: Phone encounter. No vitals available.
A: Medication renewal - protocol-eligible (Tier 1) pending final order entry.
P: Approve renewal per protocol constraints; if any exclusion criteria present, route to clinician review.
patient_instructions: If you develop new or worsening symptoms, concerning side effects, chest pain, or severe trouble breathing, seek urgent care or call 911.
If your condition changes, contact a clinician for reassessment.

evidence.snippet:
TITLE: Medication Renewal Protocol (Prototype)

INCLUSION:
- Patient requests renewal/refill of an existing medication previously prescribed.
- Patient confirms currently taking the medication as directed.
